records.usage_description: Primary defensive structure for UF in 2026 under DC Brad White. Three-down odd front with five hybrid defenders.
records.notes: Jayden Woods at JACK, Kanye Clark at STAR, Brendan Bett at nose.
records.source_name: Brad White — UF Spring Defensive Install Presser

records.usage_description: JACK is the scheme centerpiece — edge setting and pass rush both run through this hybrid spot.
records.notes: Primary blitzer and edge setter in the odd front.
records.source_name: On3 Florida — Corey Bender 3-3-5 JACK Role Breakdown

records.usage_description: STAR handles slot coverage and run fits from depth in the 3-3-5 nickel package.
records.notes: Critical vs spread tempo and 11 personnel.
records.source_name: Brad White — UF Spring Defensive Install Presser

records.usage_description: Simulated and five-man pressures triggered from JACK and STAR in package downs.
records.notes: Coverage must match pressure look — no free shots.
records.source_name: Brad White — SEC Media Day Defensive Presser

records.usage_description: Rhythm RPO quick game under OC Robby Faulkner — conflict reads on packaged run/pass.
records.notes: Eric Singleton Jr. vertical threat complements quick game.
records.source_name: Robby Faulkner — UF OC Spring Media Availability

records.usage_description: Mesh and vertical concepts in spread passing menu.
records.notes: Rebuilt OL protection is swing factor for downfield shots.
records.source_name: On3 Florida — Blake Alderman UF Passing Game Breakdown
